languages.text: "Почему ты захватил предка династии фон Валанциус и запер здесь?"
"Why did you capture the ancestor of the von Valancius dynasty and imprison him here?"
languages.original_text: "Почему ты захватил предка династии фон Валанциус и запер здесь?"

traits.locale_text: "Why did you capture the ancestor of the von Valancius dynasty and imprison him here?"
"Why did you capture the ancestor of the von Valancius dynasty and imprison him here?"
"Why did you capture the ancestor of the von Valancius dynasty and imprison him here?"

languages.text: 「なぜ、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の祖先を捕らえて、ここに監禁したのか？」
languages.original_text: "Why did you capture the ancestor of the von Valancius dynasty and imprison him here?"

traits.locale_text: 「なぜ、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の祖先を捕らえて、ここに監禁したのですか？」

languages.text: “你为什么要把冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的先祖抓来囚禁在这里？”
languages.original_text: "Why did you capture the ancestor of the von Valancius dynasty and imprison him here?"

traits.locale_text: “你为什么要把冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的先祖抓来囚禁在这里？”

languages.text: «¿Por qué capturó y encerró aquí al ancestro de la dinastía von Valancius?».
languages.original_text: "Why did you capture the ancestor of the von Valancius dynasty and imprison him here?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué capturó y encerró aquí al ancestro de la dinastía von Valancius?».

languages.text: "Warum habt Ihr den Ahnherren der Dynastie derer von Valancius gefangen genommen und hier eingesperrt?"
languages.original_text: "Why did you capture the ancestor of the von Valancius dynasty and imprison him here?"

traits.locale_text: "Warum habt Ihr den Ahnherren der Dynastie derer von Valancius gefangen genommen und hier eingesperrt?"

languages.text: « Pourquoi avez-vous capturé et emprisonné l'ancêtre de la dynastie von Valancius ? »
languages.original_text: "Why did you capture the ancestor of the von Valancius dynasty and imprison him here?"

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi avez-vous capturé et emprisonné l'ancêtre de la dynastie von Valancius ? »

languages.text: "Neden von Valancius hanedanlığının atasını esir alıp buraya hapsettin?"
languages.original_text: "Why did you capture the ancestor of the von Valancius dynasty and imprison him here?"

traits.locale_text: "Neden von Valancius hanedanlığının atasını esir alıp buraya hapsettin?"
